description: Model the end-of-life phase for plastic packaging by creating a 'Waste flow' named 'Post-consumer HDPE packaging' (Mass, kg) and connecting it to a USLCI landfill or waste treatment process (import from ~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip if needed). Calculate LCIA results using the TRACI 2.1 method (import from ~/LCA_Imports/lcia_methods.zip) and export the Global Warming Potential results to ~/LCA_Results/landfill_eol_results.csv.
